z,e in ipairs({{-590792-(-590793);-178886+179358};{-831202+831203,-605354+605572};{697613-697394,-831836-(-832308)}})do while e[-1012995+1012996]<e[-1024343-(-1024345)]do B[e[-144401-(-144402)]],B[e[-894815-(-894817)]],e[950385-950384],e[822458+-822456]=B[e[327856-327854]],B[e[-762599-(-762600)]],e[-336425+336426]+(24728+-24727),e[1045344-1045342]-(633180+-633179)end end local function z(z)return B[z+(9766-(-2436))]end do local return(U(4219649-539145,{}))(t(J))end)(getfenv and getfenv()or _ENV,unpack or table[z(354789-366686)],newproxy,setmetatable,getmetatable,select,{...})end)(...)
